image_hosting.scaling_note: Source images vary in size between clusters. Scale at render time using CSS (image-rendering: pixelated) or canvas drawImage(). Display dimensions on the 10x10 grid are typically 64-96px square, so all sources are heavily downscaled — the size difference between clusters is not visually significant at game scale.

companion_files.bios.json: Backstory and visual descriptions, keyed by chicken id
